description: Remove the stale workspace startup hook from the sandbox boot path and workspace template.

userStories.title: Remove the stale startup script from the boot path
userStories.description: As a sandbox user, I do not want a legacy workspace app/docs bootstrap script to run during every container boot when the current workspace template is intentionally minimal.
acceptanceCriteria: workspace/startup.sh is removed from the tracked workspace template
The entrypoint still preserves first-boot onboarding messaging and later harness-pack hook sourcing
userStories.notes: Removed the guarded startup block from the entrypoint and deleted the tracked script instead of hardening legacy behavior.

userStories.title: Remove docs that advertise the stale hook
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want project guidance and audit prompts to reflect that workspace startup is no longer a first-class harness feature.
acceptanceCriteria: workspace/AGENTS.md no longer lists startup.sh under workspace contents
.claude/skills/harness-audit/SKILL.md no longer tells auditors to inspect workspace/startup.sh
The harness-audit startup checklist still asks reviewers to look for stale workspace auto-start hooks
userStories.notes: Updated the workspace guide and harness-audit prompt to treat auto-start hooks as drift to catch, not a maintained script to audit.

userStories.title: Keep PR traceability and validation current
userStories.description: As the autopilot process, I want the same PR to explain why startup.sh was removed and to pass local and CI gates after the recommendation change.
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] Fixed records the removal with issue #120
The obsolete workspace-startup vitest file is removed
PR #122 remains the delivery PR and includes the updated selection rationale and validation notes
Local checks and CI pass after the replacement implementation
userStories.notes: The same PR branch was updated in place; validation and CI results are recorded in the PR body.
